CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:DailyHealthDao.kt$DailyHealthDao$( userId: Long, date: String, sleepHours: Float?, deepSleepHours: Float?, sleepQuality: Int?, bedTime: String?, wakeTime: String?, sleepLatency: Int?, wakeCount: Int? )
MaxLineLength:PeriodRecordDao.kt$PeriodRecordDao$"SELECT * FROM period_records WHERE userId = :userId AND isDeleted = 0 AND startDate <= :date AND (endDate IS NULL OR endDate >= :date) LIMIT 1"
MaxLineLength:PredictionLogDao.kt$PredictionLogDao$"SELECT * FROM prediction_logs WHERE userId = :userId AND tfliteModelUsed IS NOT NULL AND actualStartDate IS NULL ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1"
MaxLineLength:WorkoutDao.kt$WorkoutDao$"SELECT caloriesBurned FROM workout_records WHERE userId = :userId AND date >= :startDate AND date <= :endDate AND caloriesBurned IS NOT NULL ORDER BY date"

MaxLineLength:WorkoutDao.kt$WorkoutDao$"SELECT date, SUM(caloriesBurned) as totalCalories FROM workout_records WHERE userId = :userId AND date >= :startDate AND date <= :endDate AND caloriesBurned IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date ORDER BY date"

MaxLineLength:WorkoutDao.kt$WorkoutDao$"SELECT exerciseType, SUM(caloriesBurned) as totalCalories FROM workout_records WHERE userId = :userId AND date >= :startDate AND date <= :endDate AND caloriesBurned IS NOT NULL GROUP BY exerciseType ORDER BY totalCalories DESC"
